Additional notes:
- If you are using collation ONLY to make regex case-insensitive, it will be more
efficient to get rid of collation and just set a i. Please refer to
https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/reference/operator/query/regex/#mon
godb-query-op.-options.
- Many timeouts invoke "Error while multiplanner was selecting best plan". It may be
that there are many suboptimal indexes the planner is evaluating, causing this
timeout. Improving index candidacy will allow the planner to more quickly
determine the most effective index. Reducing indexes would also have a similar
effect. MongoDB 7.0.10 and onwards incorporate metrics to determine the
multi-planner trial period. Please refer to
https://jira.mongodb.org/browse/SERVER-82764.
- No further regex improvements can be made. Anchoring or prefix expressions
optimizations have already been performed by Andrey.
- Some of the previous queries showed extreme upper and lower bounds on date.
The dashboard should have some limitations to prevent abuse operations against
the database.
